JDM retro game finder

Bin Diver

Type a game you want. Get its Japanese title, the cartridge code to hunt for on the shelf, and links to buy it.

Prototype · 12,208 titles with official product codes, publishers and release years. Publisher data is complete; English titles cover 43% of entries. Titles matched from Wikidata (CC0) against the Agency for Cultural Affairs Media Arts Database.
Scan the barcode

Point at the JAN barcode on the back of a disc case — PS1–PS3, PSP, Saturn, Dreamcast, DS. The store's own price sticker won't work; use the printed one. Bare cartridges have no barcode — type the product code in the search box instead.
